summary: The implementation successfully delivers all 10 requirements for Admin Dashboard Phase 1. All requested components are present: User Assessment Data Table with search, filters, sorting, and pagination; Quick Stats Cards with four metrics; CSV export functionality; backend getAllWellnessReports() function; updated AdminDashboardPage; and useAdminAssessments React Query hook. The implementation includes comprehensive utilities for debouncing, pagination, sorting, stats calculation, and CSV generation. No missing requirements identified. Two hallucinated features detected: AccessDeniedScreen component and URL parameter utilities, neither explicitly requested in BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: AccessDeniedScreen component with bilingual access denial messaging
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify creating an access control screen. It mentions 'Do not implement user authentication beyond existing Internet Identity integration' in non-goals, suggesting authentication UI changes were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: URL parameter utilities for extracting and persisting parameters from hash-based routing
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement specified URL parameter management utilities. The getSecretParameter() function and session storage management appear to support admin token handling not mentioned in requirements.
